rows.label: tev012301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Howard about ways to protect
yourself from the weather.

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Transporting cargo on a
helicopter is not easy work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0002
rows.name:
When piloting a chopper, you gotta keep an eye
on atmospheric pressure, wind pressure, and all
sorts of other little aspects of the weather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0003
rows.name:
And here on Mira, there are
even more things that can go
wrong when flying a helicopter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0004
rows.name:
For example, you have to try to
anticipate the movement of indigens
like auravises and millesaurs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Since no one got hurt and the cargo survived,
Roscoll was able to make it through the
ordeal with his reputation intact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0006
rows.name:
BLADE lives are precious, but so are
helicopters—not to mention the cargo. We
can't be risking any of that without good reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0007
rows.name:
So I really need Ciska to start
taking her work more seriously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hopefully this experience will
be a wake-up call to start
maturing a little bit as a BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0009
rows.name:
I've heard the arms manufacturers are developing a
range of augments that can be affixed to your gear
in order to provide protection from weather effects.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0010
rows.name:
I sure hope they aren't just for
ground gear and Dolls, but can be
applied to helicopters as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Regardless, I'd love to get my hands on
a prototype. Maybe we should invest in
the companies that are developing them?[ST:wait ]
